app.name: Winter Cardinal UI
app.one_liner: A WebGL-based UI library built on PixiJS that supports both tree-shakable ES module imports and prebuilt CDN bundles with auto-loaded themes.

screens.name: Main UI Canvas
screens.purpose: Hosts rendered WebGL UI components such as buttons, panels, and trees within a PixiJS application stage.
primary_actions: Instantiate DButtonCheck or other wcardinal.ui components
Render UI using PixiJS WebGL renderer

rust_commands.name: load_all_modules
rust_commands.purpose: Explicitly loads all optional UI modules to enable component instantiation in ES module environments where tree-shaking is active.

rust_commands.name: load_white_theme_en_us
rust_commands.purpose: Loads the default white English/US theme for UI components in modular setups.

mvp_plan: week 1: Instantiate DButtonCheck and attach to stage
week 1: Verify rendering in WebGL context
acceptance_tests: When using CDN scripts, DButtonCheck is available under wcardinal.ui without manual load calls.
When using ES module imports, DButtonCheck can be instantiated only after calling loadAll() and loadThemeWhiteEnUsAll().
